Index.title: lmring
Index.subtitle: Real comparisons, real results — find the model that fits
Index.description: Compare AI models side by side and find the best fit for your needs
Index.feature_1_description: Compare multiple AI models side by side with detailed metrics and performance data
Index.feature_2_description: Test models in real-time and see immediate results for your specific use cases
Index.feature_3_description: Make informed decisions with comprehensive analytics and performance benchmarks

Leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
Leaderboard.methodology_subtitle: How we evaluate and rank AI models through systematic comparison
Leaderboard.methodology_infrastructure_d: All model comparisons are conducted through the ZeroEval Gateway API, a unified interface that standardizes access to AI models across providers. The gateway ensures consistent evaluation by handling authentication, rate limiting, and response formatting uniformly.
Leaderboard.methodology_ranking_descript: We use TrueSkill, a Bayesian ranking system developed by Microsoft Research for competitive gaming platforms. TrueSkill estimates each model's skill (μ) and uncertainty (σ) through head-to-head comparisons, updating ratings after each match.
Leaderboard.methodology_ranking_initial_: Each model begins with μ = 25.0 and σ = 8.33, representing a neutral skill estimate with high uncertainty.
Leaderboard.methodology_ranking_rating_u: After each comparison, winners gain rating points while losers lose points. The magnitude of change depends on the skill difference between competitors. Uncertainty decreases as models participate in more matches.
Leaderboard.methodology_ranking_leaderbo: Models are ranked by conservative rating (μ - 3σ), which favors models with higher confidence in their skill. This ensures that models with proven track records rank above those with high uncertainty.
Account.title: Account
Account.error: Failed to load account information. Please try refreshing the page.
Account.profile_description: Update your account details and preferences
HowItWorks.meta_description: Learn how LMRing helps you compare AI models side by side with our simple 4-step process.
HowItWorks.hero_description: Compare AI models effortlessly in 4 simple steps
HowItWorks.step_1_description: Connect your AI provider API keys in settings and enable the models you want to compare. LMRing supports 60+ providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more.
HowItWorks.step_2_description: Enter your prompt in the Arena. Select multiple models to compare side-by-side. All models receive the same prompt simultaneously for fair comparison.
HowItWorks.step_3_description: Review model responses side-by-side with detailed metrics including response time, token usage, and quality. Vote for your preferred response to help improve the leaderboard.
HowItWorks.step_4_description: View the global leaderboard to see which models perform best based on community votes. Check your conversation history to review past comparisons and insights.
HowItWorks.cta_description: Join LMRing today and start comparing models to find the best fit for your needs.

Privacy.meta_description: Learn how LMRing collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section_intro_body: LMRing is an open-source platform for comparing AI language models through blind evaluations. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our service.
Privacy.section_collect_body: We collect information you provide directly, including your account details (name, email), API keys you configure for AI providers, your conversation prompts and model votes, and usage analytics to improve our service. API keys are encrypted and stored securely.
Privacy.section_use_body: We use your information to provide and maintain the LMRing service, generate leaderboard rankings from aggregated and anonymized votes, improve our platform and user experience, and communicate important updates about the service.
Privacy.section_storage_body: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. API keys are encrypted at rest. We use PostgreSQL databases with encryption and implement access controls to protect your information. As an open-source project, our security practices are transparent and auditable.
Privacy.section_third_party_body: When you use LMRing, your prompts are sent to the AI providers whose API keys you have configured. Each provider has its own privacy policy. We also use analytics services to understand usage patterns. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
Privacy.section_cookies_body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We may use analytics cookies to understand how our service is used. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
Privacy.section_rights_body: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You can delete your account at any time, which will remove your personal data from our systems. Anonymized vote data may be retained for leaderboard integrity.
Privacy.section_changes_body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by updating the "Last updated" date on this page.
Privacy.section_contact_body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please reach out through our GitHub repository or contact us via the channels listed on our website.
Terms.meta_description: Read the terms and conditions for using the LMRing AI model comparison platform.
Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section_acceptance_body: By accessing or using LMRing, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.
Terms.section_description_body: LMRing is an open-source platform that enables users to compare AI language models through blind evaluations. Users submit prompts, receive responses from multiple AI models, and vote on the best response to contribute to community-driven rankings.
Terms.section_accounts_body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information when creating an account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
Terms.section_api_keys_body: You are responsible for any API keys you provide to the platform. LMRing acts as an intermediary, routing your prompts to AI providers using your own API keys. You are responsible for any costs incurred through your API usage and must comply with each provider's terms of service.
Terms.section_acceptable_use_body: You agree not to use LMRing to generate harmful, illegal, or abusive content, manipulate leaderboard rankings through fraudulent voting, attempt to reverse-engineer or compromise the platform's security, or violate any applicable laws or regulations.
Terms.section_ip_body: LMRing is open-source software. The platform's code is available under its respective license on GitHub. Content generated by AI models through the platform is subject to the respective AI provider's terms. Your prompts and interactions remain your own.
Terms.section_disclaimer_body: LMRing is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or availability of AI model responses or leaderboard rankings.
Terms.section_limitation_body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, LMRing and its contributors shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service, including costs from third-party API usage.
Terms.section_termination_body: We may terminate or suspend your access to LMRing at any time, with or without cause. You may stop using the service at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the service will cease immediately.
Terms.section_changes_body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
Terms.section_contact_body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please reach out through our GitHub repository or contact us via the channels listed on our website.
